summary: Comprehensive testing of ICEN Blog, Research, and Admin CRUD features completed. All 18 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend testing verified all new pages (Blog, Research, Pillar Detail), Navbar Insights dropdown, Admin Dashboard with Blog/Research CRUD tabs, Impact mosaic section, SEO meta tags, sitemap.xml, robots.txt, and mobile responsiveness.
critical_code_review_comments: ESLint warning in AdminDashboard.jsx: useEffect missing 'reload' dependency (lines 95, 219) - minor, doesn't affect functionality
Tailwind warning about ambiguous class 'duration-[900ms]' - cosmetic only
seed_data_creation: Backend seeds 6 blog posts and 5 research papers on startup (idempotent). Test CRUD operations create/delete TEST_ prefixed items.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features working correctly. Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_blog_research_api.py cover blog/research public and admin CRUD endpoints. Frontend has proper data-testid attributes for all interactive elements. SEO component sets unique titles per page. sitemap.xml and robots.txt are accessible at /sitemap.xml and /robots.txt.

backend.GET /api/blog: PASS - Returns 6 seeded blog posts with correct structure
backend.GET /api/blog/{slug}: PASS - Returns single post for valid slug, 404 for invalid
backend.GET /api/research: PASS - Returns 5 seeded research papers with correct structure
backend.GET /api/research/{slug}: PASS - Returns single paper for valid slug, 404 for invalid
backend.POST /api/admin/blog: PASS - Creates blog post with auth, returns 401 without
backend.GET /api/admin/blog: PASS - Lists all posts including drafts
backend.POST /api/admin/research: PASS - Creates research paper with auth
backend.GET /api/admin/stats: PASS - Includes blog_posts and research_papers counts

frontend.Blog page (/blog): PASS - Lists 6 blog cards with images, dates, tags, excerpts
frontend.Blog detail (/blog/:slug): PASS - Shows cover image, title, author, body, tags
frontend.Research page (/research): PASS - Lists 5 research cards with pillar, authors, abstract
frontend.Research detail (/research/:slug): PASS - Shows abstract, body, authors, pillar
frontend.Pillar detail (/pillars/:slug): PASS - Shows stats, initiatives, partners, prev/next nav
frontend.Navbar Insights dropdown: PASS - Hover shows dropdown with Insights and Research links
frontend.Mobile nav: PASS - Shows Insights and Research links in mobile menu
frontend.Admin Dashboard tabs: PASS - Applications, Insights (Blog), Research tabs all present
frontend.Admin Blog CRUD: PASS - New Post button, editor drawer with title/excerpt/body/cover/save
frontend.Admin Research CRUD: PASS - New Paper button, editor drawer with title/abstract/body/save
frontend.Impact mosaic section: PASS - 6 tiles with images (summit, tech, climate, policy, youth, infra)
frontend.SEO meta tags: PASS - Each page sets unique <title> via react-helmet-async
frontend.sitemap.xml: PASS - Accessible at /sitemap.xml with all routes
frontend.Mobile responsiveness: PASS - Hero stacks correctly, typography scales, mobile menu works
